---
title: "Classical Mechanics Notes"
---

These are my working notes while studying classical mechanics (Susskind *The Theoretical Minimum*)
as preparation for quantum mechanics.

## How this book is built

- Notes are written in Quarto (`.qmd`)
- Computations use Python (NumPy / SciPy / SymPy)
- Figures are generated during render (or saved under `assets/`)
- Animations are rendered with Manim and embedded as videos

## Topics covered

1. Vectors and derivatives
2. Newtonian mechanics
